    <p>{`Cúram Action View 1.0.0 is now available.     <h2>{`What’s Included`}</h2>
    <p>{`Action View 1.0.0 introduces `}<strong parentName="p">{`five core cards`}</strong>{` that bring together the most relevant citizen information:`}</p>

      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Cases & Entitlement`}</strong>{` — central access to cases, payments, verifications, issues, and evidence across all case types  `}</li>

      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Recent Activity`}</strong>{` — a consolidated, filterable timeline of notes across all applications and cases  `}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><strong parentName="li">{`Quick Actions`}</strong>{` — rapid note creation with control over where notes are saved  `}</li>

    <p>{`Action View supports `}<strong parentName="p">{`customisation`}</strong>{` of cards, including specifying which cards to display, their layout, and the ability to create custom cards.`}</p>
